roles.content: Truth theories: A comprehensive examination of truth theories within Logic & Epistemology, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
roles.source: British Journal for the Philosophy of Science

roles.content: Critical perspectives on truth theories: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to truth theories.
Recent developments in truth theories: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of truth theories in contemporary philosophy.
